---
title: "Influenza Clade Explorer"
author: "Elgin Akin"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://d3js.org/d3.v7.min.js"></script>
---

::: {.app-container}

::: {.sidebar}
::: {.sidebar-header}
## Influenza Clade Nomenclature Explorer
- Author: [Elgin Akin](https://elginakin.github.io)
- Data Source:  [Influenza Clade Nomenclature](https://github.com/influenza-clade-nomenclature) 
Currently Only HA Subclade Nomenclature is supported. 
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Lineage
<select id="lineage-select" class="form-control">
<option value="H3N2">H3N2</option>
<option value="H1N1">H1N1pdm</option>
<option value="Victoria">B/Victoria</option>
</select>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Filter
<select id="clade-filter" class="form-control">
<option value="">All clades</option>
</select>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Search
<input type="text" id="search-input" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., C.3">
<div id="search-results" class="search-results"></div>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
### Display Options
<label class="checkbox-label">
<input type="checkbox" id="show-labels" checked> Show labels
</label>
<label class="checkbox-label">
<input type="checkbox" id="show-legend"> Show color legend
</label>
<label class="checkbox-label">
<input type="checkbox" id="show-table"> Show data table
</label>
:::

::: {.sidebar-section}
<div id="stats-box" class="stats-box">
<span id="node-count">Loading...</span>
</div>
<button id="refresh-data" class="btn-refresh">🔄 Refresh Data</button>
:::

:::

::: {.main-content}
::: {.main-header}
# [Influenza H3N2 Clade Hierarchy]{#main-title}
:::

<div id="color-legend" class="color-legend"></div>

::: {.content-area}

::: {.viz-panel}
::: {.viz-container #viz-container}
<div id="loading" class="loading">
<div class="spinner"></div>
<p>Loading clade data...</p>
</div>
<svg id="tree-svg"></svg>
:::
:::

::: {.inspector-panel #inspector-panel}
::: {.inspector-header}
### 🔍 Clade Inspector
:::
::: {.inspector-content #inspector-content}
<div class="inspector-placeholder">
<p>Click on a clade node to view details</p>
</div>
:::
:::

:::

::: {.table-panel #table-panel}
::: {.table-header}
<h3>📊 Clade Data Table</h3>
<div class="table-actions">
<input type="text" id="table-search" class="form-control table-search" placeholder="Filter table...">
<button id="download-csv" class="btn-download">Download CSV</button>
</div>
:::
::: {.table-container}
<table id="data-table" class="data-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th data-sort="clade">Clade ↕</th>
<th data-sort="parent">Parent ↕</th>
<th data-sort="alias">Alias ↕</th>
<th data-sort="mutations">Defining Mutations</th>
<th data-sort="mutCount"># Mut ↕</th>
<th data-sort="repCount"># Rep ↕</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody id="table-body">
</tbody>
</table>
:::
:::

:::

:::

<div id="tooltip" class="tooltip"></div>

::: {.app-footer}
Influenza Clade Nomenclature is sourced from the [Influenza Clade Nomenclature](https://github.com/influenza-clade-nomenclature) Github Repository| Built with Quarto & D3.js
:::

```{=html}
<script type="module" src="clade-tree.js"></script>
